message:
feat(fwc/template): resolve allOf/oneOf/anyOf schema composition in template generation

Add recursive schema resolution that flattens composed JSON Schema constructs
before generating templates. Key changes:

- resolve_schema: handles allOf (merge all variants), oneOf/anyOf (pick first)
- merge_schema_values: deep-merges properties, unions required arrays, merges
  items schemas, with overlay-wins semantics for scalar fields
- resolve_nested_schema: recursively resolves composed sub-schemas inside
  properties and items
- generate_template/generate_property: now resolve refs before type dispatch,
  and fall back to structural inference (presence of "properties" or "items")
  when "type" is absent
- Tests: allOf merging required properties, oneOf first-variant selection,
  nested composed property generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
